prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This accessibility statement specifically addresses a service operated by the RPA, which primarily facilitates licenses for animal movements in England. The legislation and regulations on animal movement may differ across the UK nations, thus it does not apply to Scotland.
